message:
fix: add 10px padding to arrow segment collision detection in overlap resolver

Labels were visually overlapping arrows because the collision AABB used
the raw 2px segment width. With 10px padding, labels now detect nearby
arrow segments and nudge away. Regenerated architecture diagram and
bidirectional-edges baseline.
